# Security Policy

## Supported Versions

The following versions of NIGHTFRAME are currently supported with security updates:

| Version | Supported |
| ------- | --------- |
| 2.0.x   | Yes       |
| < 2.0   | No        |

## Reporting a Vulnerability

Please use GitHub's private vulnerability reporting feature for this
repository. Do not open a public issue containing exploit details.

We will acknowledge receipt of your report within 48 hours and provide a timeline for resolution if the vulnerability is confirmed.
